creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
> Synopsis: [PATCH] devel/p5-Module-Metadata: update to 1.000009
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: kuriyama
> State-Changed-When: Wed Feb 22 22:49:19 UTC 2012
> State-Changed-Why:
> How to fail your test?  version.pm is included since 5.9.x and our default
> perl version is 5.12 now.  Do you care about 5.8.9?
>

See attached log. Basically, it needs a newer version of p5-version. If
this needs to be conditional depending on the version of perl, that's
fine. I only test with the default version.

Steve
